description.p: Unify is a web app aggregator that brings all your favorite web applications (Spotify, YouTube, Gmail, WhatsApp Web, and more) into a single, desktop-native window.
Organize your web apps into workspaces, switch between them instantly, and enjoy desktop features like native notifications, screen sharing, and media session tracking.

ul.li: Run multiple web apps in one application window
Organize services into customizable workspaces
Native desktop notifications integration
Screen sharing and webcam support
DRM content playback (Spotify, Netflix, Prime Video with Widevine)
Media session tracking with "Now Playing" indicator
Favicon auto-detection for service icons
Detachable windows for individual services
Keyboard shortcuts support

screenshot.caption: Unify managing multiple web services (Discord, YouTube, Gmail, etc.) in a single application window
Workspace drawer menu showing organized service categories (Favorites, Social, Office, Multimedia)
Horizontal service bar with quick access to multiple web applications
Workspace status bar with quick access to multiple workspaces
Service configuration dialog for adding and editing web services

description.p: This release introduces major enhancements to service management, zoom controls, audio handling, and system tray functionality:

ul.li: Added tabbed browsing support for services with improved navigation
Added per-service zoom controls with persistence and dropdown menu
Added configurable zoom controls visibility toggle
Added per-service and global audio mute functionality
Added system tray icon visibility toggle
Replaced internal link overlay with cleaner tab context menu
Added workspace-level isolated storage - workspaces can now have separate cookies, authentication, and data (e.g., Personal vs Work)
Added page-initiated fullscreen support (press ESC to exit)
Fixed service disabling from any workspace
Fixed favicon preview for domain-only URLs
Disabled WebEngine GPU by default to improve stability

description.p: This release adds several new features to improve your experience:

ul.li: Added HTTP warning for service URLs
Added download confirmation
Added IconHorse integration as additional favicon source
Added Google favicon as fallback for service icons
Added refresh service action to header toolbar (Ctrl+R and F5 shortcut)
Added Dutch translation

description.p: Removed Widevine installation script (now handled internally).
